name: Numos
oneliner: Agentic AI finance platform that automates FP&A, reconciliation, and quote-to-cash workflows for enterprise CFOs with full reasoning transparency.
finserv: Enterprise customers include Udemy and Dandy. 80% faster FP&A cycles, book-close time cut in half. Every reasoning step auditable. Backed by General Catalyst.
team: Founded by Parijat Sarkar and Mitul Tiwari. Seed led by General Catalyst, Operator Collective.
thesis: Numos targets the CFO layer — the governance and control centre that enterprise agents report through. The 'show your reasoning' architecture addresses the explainability gap regulators are formalising.
evidence: Numos Raises Seed from General Catalyst
